title: Woodland Study No. 4
description: An original mixed-media study of the quiet edge where meadow meets woods.
story: Painted in small layers over a slow autumn week.

title: Little Studio Cat Print
description: A soft, watchful portrait print for a small wall, reading nook, or bedside.
story: Made from a quiet studio companion who always finds the warmest seat.
materials: Archival pigment print on cotton paper

title: Forest Green Handbag
description: A structured vintage handbag in the deepest woodland green.
story: Found in beautiful condition, with just enough patina to tell its story.

title: Kitchen Fern
description: A cheerful little fern settled into a simple, timeworn pot.
story: Propagated from the studio plant that refuses to stop growing.
materials: Living fern in a vintage ceramic planter

title: Speckled Stoneware Set
description: A softly mismatched family of cups and vessels in warm, milky glaze.
story: Thrown and pinched in small batches, with every variation left in place.

title: Cedar & Moss Candle
description: A dark, woodsy candle poured into an amber glass tumbler.
story: Made for rainy afternoons, old books, and a kettle on the stove.
materials: Soy wax, cedarwood and oakmoss fragrance
